## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / meta
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets or real credentials added
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] PR is focused (easy to review)
